title: Certified Ecoturism value chain analysis in the Zărnești – Piatra Craiului ’eco-destination’
description: An abstract presenting first findings from the MOVING project’s analysis of the certified ecotourism value chain in the Zărnești–Piatra Craiului eco-destination. It outlines the region’s ecotourism characteristics and recommends strategies to strengthen its contribution to sustainable local development.
